## 🚀 Scope of Changes
Detail the key changes included in this PR Like:

- Implemented JWT-based authentication for secure user login and session management  
- Refactored API routes to follow RESTful standards and improve maintainability  
- Added input validation and error handling for all user-related endpoints  
- Integrated MongoDB connection pooling to optimize database performance  
- Updated frontend login UI to handle authentication states and error messages  
- Added unit tests for authentication and user services (85% coverage)
